summary.description: integer greater than 1 that has no positive divisors other than 1 and itself
summary.extract: A prime number is a natural number greater than 1 that is not a product of two smaller natural numbers. Prime numbers are central objects in number theory.
summary.title: Prime number

wikitext:
{{Short description|Natural number greater than 1 with no divisors other than 1 and itself}}
'''Prime numbers''' are studied in [[number theory]].

== Properties ==
* A prime has exactly two positive divisors.
